Research brief:
# Release readiness research brief

Project: AgentOps Dashboard v1.3.

Goal: decide whether the team can release the new AI-company monitoring dashboard to an internal Ubuntu environment this week.

Required final artifact: a concise release-readiness summary with a clear go/no-go/conditional-go decision, evidence references, release risks, rollback posture, and uncertainty.

Decision pressure: stakeholders want a fast release, but the system must not hide token overflow, router instability, false success, missing evidence, or watchdog findings.

Evidence summary:
Release target: AgentOps Dashboard v1.3 for internal Ubuntu users.
Functional tests: 42 unit tests passed, 0 failed.
Backend API tests: 11 passed, 0 failed.
Historical fixture frontend build: passed in 18.4 seconds; current checkout dashboard runtime is not verified.
Historical fixture dashboard smoke: backend health returned 200 and frontend returned 200; current checkout dashboard runtime is not verified.
Live router smoke: 4 of 5 prompts succeeded; 1 partial response was retried successfully.
Failure drill evidence: deleting one status file produced MISSING_STATUS_FILE and watchdog generated a fallback failure status.
Blocker B1: live strict-profile violation drill has not completed against the production router path.
Blocker B2: 8-hour dashboard backend soak test has not completed.
Non-blocker N1: minor mobile spacing issue.
Non-blocker N2: historical trend table is table-only by design.
Token overflow mitigation: Main Agent Memory Guard checkpoints condensed state and avoids replaying full logs.
Router mitigation: watchdog treats partial or empty router response as recoverable failure with bounded retry/replan.
False success mitigation: claim ledger requires evidence refs and reviewer can block FALSE_SUCCESS_BLOCKED.
Rollback posture: rollback script is documented, staging-tested, and expected rollback time is 15 minutes.
Decision implication: release should be conditional go only after B1 and B2 are closed; not clean go today.
Uncertainty: no long-duration soak evidence and no live strict-profile violation drill evidence yet.

Required keywords: conditional go, blocker, evidence, rollback, uncertainty, router, overflow
